name: Pina Colada Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice bananas crosswise.
2. In a blender or food processor fitted with a metal blade, combine half of the Pina Colada drink mix, pineapple juice, milk, cream of coconut, and banana slices. Process until pureed; pour into a 6-cup bowl.
3. Puree remaining half of liquid ingredients with eggs and liqueur in another blender or food processor. Combine both purées.
4. In a separate bowl, combine raisins and crushed pineapple with juice; set aside.
5. Place about two-thirds of the bread cubes in the slow cooker. Sprinkle half a teaspoon of grated lemon peel over the bread and spread one cup of the raisin mixture over it.
6. Top with remaining bread cubes and then the remaining lemon peel and raisin-pineapple mixture.
7. Pour the purée into the slow cooker.
8. Cover and cook on low for 6 hours.
9. Spoon pudding into dessert dishes and serve hot, garnished with mint. If serving cold, spoon into a serving dish, cover, and refrigerate; then enjoy later.
